.. SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0+

.. _uniLoader_doc:

The uniLoader Documentation
===========================

This is the top level of uniLoader's documentation tree. uniLoader
documentation, is very much a work in progress. Please note that
improvements to the documentation are welcome via GitHub PRs.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

User-oriented documentation
---------------------------

The following manuals are written for *users* of uniLoader - those who are
booting Linux (or any other kernel) using it

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   build/index
   learn/index
   usage/index

Board-specific documentation
----------------------------

The following manuals are about board-specific documentation. Each vendor has
their own subdirectory.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   board/index


Developer documentation
-----------------------

The following manuals are written for developers of uniLoader - those trying to
improve it.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   dev/index

Indices and tables
==================

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   genindex
